# GHOST.PROTOCOL

GHOST.PROTOCOL is a concept album and recovery archive by Sparrow x Echo.

Naming convention:
- Display/brand: GHOST.PROTOCOL
- Body text: Ghost Protocol
- Archive labels: GHOST PROTOCOL ARCHIVE

Core premise:
- The archive kept the record.
- The people kept the reason.
- The signal does not end here.

Primary sections:
- Why This Exists
- Recovery Logs
- Seraph Research Notes
- Playlist
- Recovered Fragments
- Visual Archive
- Final Transmission

Canonical playlist:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL7NolO6GeT1Ct9RJmSJdHH-8osbngj3nD
